query: SELECT id, name, email, role FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%Teste%' OR name LIKE '%Test%' OR name LIKE '%Rank%' OR name LIKE '%Batch%' OR name LIKE '%Sheets%' OR name LIKE '%Duplica%' OR name LIKE '%Visitas%' OR name LIKE '%Performance%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name = 'João Silva Atualizado' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste%' OR name = 'Sem nome' OR name = 'Juliana Alonso' ORDER BY name LIMIT 100;
